creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text: It looks like an __atomic_store() implementation exists in contrib/compiler-rt/lib/builtins/atomic.c, but we don't build it in lib/libcompiler_rt.  I'm not sure if it's as simple as adding that or if we need to/can do it only on certain platforms.  Adding some CC's of people who have touched lib/libcompiler_rt recently.
